nasb.text: He is the stone which was rejected by you, the builders, but  which became the chief corner  stone.

esv.text: This Jesus is the stone that was rejected by you, the builders, which has become the cornerstone.

cnv.text: 這耶穌是你們 ‘建築工人所棄的石頭， 成了房角的主要石頭。’

ccb.text: “‘祂是你们工匠丢弃的石头， 已成了房角石。’

csbs.text: 这一位就是 ‘被你们工匠所藐视的石头， 它已经成了房角的头块石头。’
